system.flavor: You shoot a dart imbued with the hallucinogenic venom of the blight lands, critical for escaping huge monsters.
system.effect:
Mark a foe in range with a toxic dart. While marked:
• your foe has attack [-] against all foes not adjacent to them
• once a round, when your foe misses an attack, they stumble and you may push them 1d3+1 in any direction
A foe may save at the end of their turn to end this mark.
Overdrive a further attack [-] and push +2
